message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="kent-beck" color="blue" summary="Clarifying which doc gets status markers">
Thanks Heydon. One small clarification from the discussion with Marty: the status markers should go in `docs/user-stories.md` (which has the canonical "V1 GTD Priority and Implementation Order" section at the bottom), not `docs/gtd-product-discovery.md`. The discovery doc has a similar list but the user-stories version is the precise one with sub-story breakdowns. Does that change your consent?

Otherwise, noted — 3 of 9 aligned (Kent, Marty, Heydon). Six more to go.
</teammate-message>

input.content: Heydon here. Good clarification — `docs/user-stories.md` is the right place since it has the precise implementation order with sub-story breakdowns. Doesn't change my consent at all. Still fully aligned.
input.summary: Confirms consent, agrees user-stories.md is correct

routing.summary: Confirms consent, agrees user-stories.md is correct

content.text: Confirmed. `docs/user-stories.md` is the right location for the status markers. 3 of 9 aligned so far — waiting on the other six teammates.
